hero_subtitle: SFTY connects multi-provider outputs into a unified compliance operating layer that preserves audit evidence and supports structured reviews for regulated digital asset businesses.

trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Audit evidence gaps slow compliance reviews
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle to trace decision history when provider outputs and evidence remain disconnected across multiple systems. This weakens audit readiness and complicates case reconstruction in vendor-neutral workflows for digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects and normalizes outputs from multiple providers into a unified compliance workflow that records decisions, retains evidence, and supports traceable case reconstruction for vendor-neutral audit readiness.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY connects multiple provider results through rules, reviews, cases and decisions to create a vendor-neutral, traceable compliance audit trail.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple provider outputs into structured workflows with decision logs, cases and evidence to support audit readiness without replacing existing compliance tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with secure orchestration and scalable deployment that preserves audit evidence and strengthens due diligence across multi-provider compliance workflows.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a provider-neutral compliance control layer, connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening outputs into connected workflows, cases, decision logs and reports for digital asset compliance teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate multiple providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates provider results, normalizes data and applies internal policies to route reviews, open cases, record decisions and preserve evidence across jurisdictional and product-specific compliance workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves comprehensive audit trails including case history, decision logs, provider outputs and evidence packages to support operational review readiness and regulatory inspection preparation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and blockchain analytics providers without replacement, layering on top to connect and orchestrate compliance workflows and reporting.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, decision records, evidence and reporting to reduce fragmentation and support scalable compliance operations.
final_title: Preserve audit evidence within vendor-neutral workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY organizes provider outputs into structured cases, decision logs and audit-ready evidence for regulated VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
